title: Mirror production routes in staging
detail: Import existing DNS and edge policies into a non-public environment to validate behavior before traffic changes.

title: Set secure transport defaults
detail: Enable encrypted transport, inspect certificate coverage, and review request logs to confirm expected request paths.

title: Warm cache regions with synthetic requests
detail: Prime frequently used assets so early users do not pay the full cold-start transfer penalty in every region.

title: Shift traffic gradually
detail: Move real traffic in small percentages while tracking latency, origin load, and application error rates.
